name: Web App
requiredVerification: form validation and duplicate-submit review when forms change
API timeout, failure, unauthorized, forbidden, and validation-error review where relevant
keyboard, focus, accessible name, and status-message review for critical interactions
bundle, asset, loading, or responsiveness impact review when performance-sensitive code changes
E2E or manual behavior check for critical flows
releaseChecks: desktop and mobile critical flows verified when UI behavior changes
API contract and permission changes reviewed before release
form submission, API failure, accessibility, and performance evidence reviewed when touched
client-side secrets and production config exposure reviewed
browser support, rollback, and post-release observation reviewed for critical flows

may: edit web UI, routing, state, tests, and documentation inside the current governed task scope
derive and implement API contract, runtime quality, accessibility, performance, auth, permission, dependency, and verification choices from project evidence
mustNot: store secrets or privileged decisions only in client-side code
delegate reversible project-local auth, permission, dependency, architecture, migration, or test strategy choices to the user
perform a production or external release, external provider action, paid value transfer, real-user communication, or irreversible production-data effect without exact consent
hide API failures, bypass accessibility-critical behavior, or add heavy dependencies without explicit evidence
